name: aircode
description: General-purpose agent platform built on Pi Agent Harness

scripts.build: npm run build -w @aircode/shared && npm run build -w @aircode/runtime && npm run build -w @aircode/smoke-cli && npm run build:host -w @aircode/desktop && npm run build:ui -w @aircode/desktop
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @aircode/shared && npm run build -w @aircode/runtime && npm run dev -w @aircode/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @aircode/shared && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/runtime && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/smoke-cli && npm run typecheck -w @aircode/desktop
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/*/dist apps/*/dist apps/desktop/host-dist apps/desktop/src-tauri/target node_modules
